item.title: StarTalk: Is Absolute Zero Possible?
item.description: An explanation of absolute zero and why quantum physics places fundamental limits on how close we can get to it, based on current scientific understanding.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Is Absolute Zero Possible?
media:content.media:description: An explanation of absolute zero and why quantum physics places fundamental limits on how close we can get to it, based on current scientific understanding.

item.title: Can Music Heal the Brain? | StarTalk
item.description: An exploration of how music may impact brain health, examining research on memory, mood, and neurological recovery in therapeutic and scientific contexts.

media:content.media:title: Can Music Heal the Brain? | StarTalk
media:content.media:description: An exploration of how music may impact brain health, examining research on memory, mood, and neurological recovery in therapeutic and scientific contexts.

item.title: Decoding Stonehenge with StarTalk
item.description: An exploration of Stonehenge, examining its origins, construction, and the theories behind its purpose and cultural significance.

media:content.media:title: Decoding Stonehenge with StarTalk
media:content.media:description: An exploration of Stonehenge, examining its origins, construction, and the theories behind its purpose and cultural significance.

item.title: StarTalk: New Weight Loss Methods and Health
item.description: An overview of emerging weight loss approaches and their health impact, examining effectiveness, risks, and what to consider before trying new methods.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: New Weight Loss Methods and Health
media:content.media:description: An overview of emerging weight loss approaches and their health impact, examining effectiveness, risks, and what to consider before trying new methods.

item.title: StarTalk: Why Zodiac Signs Can Misalign
item.description: StarTalk explores why zodiac signs may not line up as expected, offering a clear look at the idea behind the misalignment.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Why Zodiac Signs Can Misalign
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores why zodiac signs may not line up as expected, offering a clear look at the idea behind the misalignment.

item.title: StarTalk on finding scientific consensus
item.description: StarTalk explains how broader scientific consensus across trusted medical organizations can help clarify where experts agree.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk on finding scientific consensus
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explains how broader scientific consensus across trusted medical organizations can help clarify where experts agree.

item.title: Digging a Hole Through Earth with StarTalk
item.description: StarTalk explores the idea of digging a hole through Earth in this short, science-themed video.

media:content.media:title: Digging a Hole Through Earth with StarTalk
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores the idea of digging a hole through Earth in this short, science-themed video.
